summary: Verified 5 UX changes via source audit + partial UI smoke. All changes correctly implemented in the named files. UI smoke confirmed admin login + /admin/users renders without 'Role Hierarchy & Permissions' card. Repeat UI runs were flaky due to backend rate-limit (HTTP 429) on /access/roles and /users/ and intermittent blank-page navigations under load — not a code defect. No JS pageerrors detected.

verified_changes.useEventCart_10min_ttl: CONFIRMED via source. CART_TTL_MS=600000; isStale() purges on mount; setTimeout clears at deadline; touch() refreshes last_active_at on every mutation; localStorage removed on expire; live expiresInSeconds countdown exposed.
verified_changes.podmanagement_managementshell: CONFIRMED — ManagementShell wrapper at line 254 with testIdPrefix='pods-mgmt'; Create Pod button in scopeFilter.
verified_changes.users_no_role_hierarchy_no_joined_col: CONFIRMED — no 'Role Hierarchy & Permissions' text in JSX (grep clean); table headers (lines 624-630) are User/Role/Operator/Status/Orders/Actions only — no 'Joined'. Joined still in grid card + details view + filters as intended. Browser smoke confirmed string absent from rendered body on /admin/users.
verified_changes.customerservice_managementshell_subpage: CONFIRMED — ManagementShell wrapper at line 975 with testIdPrefix='customer-service-mgmt' + Tickets/Statistics/Team tabs; SubpageCard with testId='cs-substatus-card' for Open/Pending/In Progress/Resolved/Closed sub-tabs.
verified_changes.banquetcheckout_why_service_fee: CONFIRMED — 'Why the service fee?' explanation block at line 714 with full 5% breakdown (vendor verification + payment processing + event-day support + booking guarantee).

action_items: MINOR (optional): The review request mentions testids 'customer-service-mgmt-tab-tickets/-statistics/-team' and 'pods-mgmt-tab-...' but the tabs in CustomerServiceManagement.jsx (lines 994-998) and PodManagement.jsx don't pass per-tab `testId`. ManagementShell only emits data-testid for tabs that supply one. Either add `testId: 'customer-service-mgmt-tab-tickets'` etc. to each tab object, or rely on label text in tests.
critical_code_review_comments: useEventCart.js has the prevCount setState-during-render pattern (lines 190-194) to reset expiresInSeconds. Works but unconventional — a useEffect on [count] would be cleaner.
CustomerServiceManagement.jsx is 1099 lines — exceeds the 700-line module-size guideline. Consider splitting Tickets/Statistics/Team tab bodies into separate components.
Users.jsx is 850 lines — also over the 700-line guideline.
seed_data_creation: None (UI seeding via localStorage attempted for banquet cart but later run was blocked by rate-limit; source audit confirms cart logic).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend was under HTTP 429 rate limiting at the time of this run, causing transient blank pages on multiple sequential SPA navigations after admin login. Future runs should pace navigations (≥10s between auth'd page loads) or restart backend rate-limit window. All five UX changes are visible in source; no code defect detected.
rca of the issue: n/a — all features verified present and consistent with the request.
